summary: See clues file for full details. 5 tossups, 6 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 5 tossups and 6 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: Do not read this question to Cornell A This artist won a third-place medal at the Paris Salon for a painting in which a crowd featuring various ages and races watches Mary, Martha, and Jesus as they raise Lazarus from his grave.
examples: Do not read this question to Cornell A This artist won a third-place medal at the Paris Salon for a painting in which a crowd featuring various ages and races watches Mary, Martha, and Jesus as they raise Lazarus from his grave.

clues.clue: This artist painted lions in several works, including a blue-shaded religious scene in which the lower half of the central figure's body is cast in a rectangular beam of light.
examples: This artist painted lions in several works, including a blue-shaded religious scene in which the lower half of the central figure's body is cast in a rectangular beam of light.

clues.clue: This artist of that version of Daniel in the Lions' Den traveled in the Levant, inspiring works including one that he staged unconventionally as a peasant girl peering towards the beam of light appearing in her doorway; that work is this artist's Annunciation.
examples: This artist of that version of Daniel in the Lions' Den traveled in the Levant, inspiring works including one that he staged unconventionally as a peasant girl peering towards the beam of light appearing in her doorway; that work is this artist's Annunciation.

clues.clue: This man drew on his faith and race in a work depicting a poor African-American father and son praying before a meal.
examples: This man drew on his faith and race in a work depicting a poor African-American father and son praying before a meal.

clues.clue: A figure's upper half is obscured by shadows in this artist's Daniel in the Lion's Den, which is now considered lost.
examples: A figure's upper half is obscured by shadows in this artist's Daniel in the Lion's Den, which is now considered lost.

clues.clue: The White House contains a landscape created by this artist of Sand Dunes at Sunset, which features a hazy sailboat on the horizon.
examples: The White House contains a landscape created by this artist of Sand Dunes at Sunset, which features a hazy sailboat on the horizon.

clues.clue: A small double portrait is visible in the corner of a room in this artist's The Dancing Lesson.
examples: A small double portrait is visible in the corner of a room in this artist's The Dancing Lesson.

clues.clue: This artist depicted the angel Gabriel as a sliver of yellow light in his version of The Annunciation.
examples: This artist depicted the angel Gabriel as a sliver of yellow light in his version of The Annunciation.

clues.clue: (*) An old man and the child are depicted praying at the dining table in this artist's The Thankful Poor; those same figures appear in this artist's most famous work, which was possibly inspired by the literature of Paul Dunbar.
examples: (*) An old man and the child are depicted praying at the dining table in this artist's The Thankful Poor; those same figures appear in this artist's most famous work, which was possibly inspired by the literature of Paul Dunbar.

clues.clue: This artist once spent a period of time in the Blue Ridge mountains, references from which show up in many of his paintings.
examples: This artist once spent a period of time in the Blue Ridge mountains, references from which show up in many of his paintings.

clues.clue: This artist's mother glows against a dark brown background in a portrait that echoes the poses of both Whistler's mother and Thomas Eakins' painting of Amelia van Buren.
examples: This artist's mother glows against a dark brown background in a portrait that echoes the poses of both Whistler's mother and Thomas Eakins' painting of Amelia van Buren.

clues.clue: The story "Uncle Tim's Compromise on Christmas" inspired the first painting by this artist to be accepted to the Paris Salon.
examples: The story "Uncle Tim's Compromise on Christmas" inspired the first painting by this artist to be accepted to the Paris Salon.
